def positive_optional_parameter_used_without_none_guard():
    rule_id = "optional_parameter_used_without_none_guard"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Optional[T] parameter accessed via attribute or subscript without a preceding None guard."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
